name: Classic Green Chile Sauce
recipeIngredient: 2 cups green new mexican chiles, roasted and seeds removed, chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add the chopped onions and garlic. Cook until the onions are softened.
3. Stir in the chopped green chiles and tomatoes (if using).
4. Add the vegetable oil, cumin, and water. Stir to combine all ingredients.
5. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat and simmer for 30 minutes.
6. Puree the sauce until smooth using an immersion blender or regular blender.
7. Adjust seasoning with salt and pepper if needed.
8. Serve warm over rice or use as desired.
